text: resample bb, view vv, learner aa, candidate cluster count KK, package computes partition πbvaK. \pi_{bvaK}. current default learners : PAM distance view hierarchical clustering distance view k-means latent view run contributes co-membership matrix MbvaK(,j)=𝟏{πbvaK()=πbvaK(j)}. M_{bvaK}(, j) = \mathbf 1\{\pi_{bvaK}() = \pi_{bvaK}(j)\}. averaged consensus matrix CKC_K.

title: Method and Design
text: Pairwise consensus uncertainty summarized binary entropy: h(p)=−plogp−(1−p)log(1−p). h(p) = -p\log p - (1-p)\log(1-p). package reports SK=1−1log2meani<jh(CK(,j)). S_K = 1 - \frac{1}{\log 2}\text{mean}_{<j}\, h(C_K(,j)). High SKS_K means low pairwise ambiguity therefore stable consensus structure.

title: Method and Design
text: Null tables generated column-wise permutation observed values within active column, preserving marginal distribution breaking cross-column structure. null replicate rr, pipeline produces SK(0,r)S_K^{(0,r)}. replicates compute: μ0,K=meanrSK(0,r),σ0,K=sdrSK(0,r). \mu_{0,K} = \text{mean}_r\, S_K^{(0,r)}, \qquad \sigma_{0,K} = \text{sd}_r\, S_K^{(0,r)}. define: ΔK=SK−μ0,K,ZK=ΔKσ0,K+ε. \Delta_K = S_K - \mu_{0,K}, \qquad Z_K = \frac{\Delta_K}{\sigma_{0,K} + \varepsilon}. Monte Carlo p-value pK=1+∑r𝟏{SK(0,r)≥SK}R0+1. p_K = \frac{ 1 + \sum_r \mathbf 1\{S_K^{(0,r)} \ge S_K\} }{ R_0 + 1 }.

title: Method and Design
text: Let Tobs=maxKΔK. T_{\text{obs}} = \max_K \Delta_K. null replicate compute analogous maximum candidate K, yields global null distribution. gives global p-value statement “table stronger clustering signal null baseline”. null rejected, package reports: selected_k = 1 cluster = 1 confidence = NA exploratory_cluster strongest unsupported split

title: Method and Design
text: global null rejected, package selects among supported K using JK=ZK−λlogK−γ∑g=1K𝟏{|Gg|<nmin}. J_K = Z_K - \lambda \log K - \gamma \sum_{g=1}^{K} \mathbf 1\{|G_g| < n_{\min}\}. keeps chosen solution stable, null-improving, resistant small accidental clusters.
